allow: Bash(node -e "try{const {DatabaseSync}=require\('node:sqlite'\);const db=new DatabaseSync\(':memory:'\);db.exec\('CREATE TABLE t\(x\)'\);db.prepare\('INSERT INTO t VALUES\(?\)'\).run\(42\);console.log\('node:sqlite OK ->',db.prepare\('SELECT x FROM t'\).get\(\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('NEEDS FLAG or unavailable:',e.message\)}")
